title: sphaerocionium axillare
intro: Sphaerocionium axillare, also known as the African bloodstained lichen, is a type of lichenized fungus that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium axillare include its potential to treat skin conditions, wound healing, and as an antiseptic, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Sphaerocionium axillare can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
